title: Maximal Warden Datapack
description: Maximal Warden Datapack Is A Datapack Which Adds Two New Types Of Warden To Minecraft Named Maximal Warden And Progressive Warden , They Are Powerful
body:
Guys Its My First DataPack It Adds A New Warden To Minecraft Named Maximal Warden And Another One Named Progressive Warden

Use /function maximal_warden:maximal-warden-spawn-egg To Get Maximal Warden Spawn Egg

Use /function maximal_warden:progressive-warden-spawn-egg To Get Progressive Warden Spawn Egg

The Maximal Warden Features

![Maximal Warden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ad675560647c46987b548e8cfd332bbedfcf68d.webp)

1. Break Any Block On Its Front Side

2.Give The Player Wither Effect In The Range Of 3 Blocks

3.Drops Maximal Warden Head Cover Which You Can Wear It

4. Can Regenerate Its Health

5. Immune To Harming Effects

6. Can Summon 6 Progressive Wardens Every 60 Seconds

7. Attack Damage 130

8.Health 2000

9. Scale 1.16 of The Original Warden



The Progressive Warden Features

![Progressive Warden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc5e2542c1ea9c34f53846033f4068e1264e7a3f.webp)

1. Break Any Block On Its Front Side

2.Give The Player Wither Effect In The Range Of 3 Blocks

3. Can Regenerate Its Health

4. Immune To Harming Effects

5. Attack Damage 130

6.Health 1500

7. Scale 1.16 of The Original Warden



The Maximal Warden Head Cover Features

![Maximal Warden Head Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea939bdd039641a0bfc71d340d3a1e9f71467ab8.webp)

1. Clears Darkness Effect When You Wear It



Guys For RP

1. Optifine Required
